name: RefPointButtonType
summary: Definition of available positions of the reference point on a reference point button.

enum_values.name: eAllNinePositions
enum_values.summary: All nine positions of the reference point are available.

enum_values.name: eAllTenPositions
enum_values.summary: All nine positions of the reference point are available, plus tenth option. of an undefined point.

enum_values.name: eCorners
enum_values.summary: Only four positions in the corners possible.

enum_values.name: eCornersCenter
enum_values.summary: Five positions possible. Four in the corners plus in the center.

enum_values.name: eLeftRightCenter
enum_values.summary: Three positions possible. Center-left, center-center and center-right.

enum_values.name: eNoCorners
enum_values.summary: Five positions possible. In the middle and on the center of each edge.

enum_values.name: eTopBottomCenter
enum_values.summary: Three positions possible. Top-center, center-center and bottom-center.
